/**
 * Data structure for a single taxi destination.
 * Matches TaxiDestination on the server.
 */ /**
 * Parser for TaxiOpenListComposer
 * Reads: [count] [roomId][virtualRoomId][displayName] * count
 */export class TaxiOpenListParser{constructor(){this._destinations=[];}flush(){this._destinations=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const total=wrapper.readInt();this._destinations=[];for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const roomId=wrapper.readInt();const virtualRoomId=wrapper.readInt();const displayName=wrapper.readString();this._destinations.push({roomId,virtualRoomId,displayName});}return true;}/** Getter for parsed data */get destinations(){return this._destinations;}}
